description: Add Plugin System and Metrics/Observability. These are infrastructure features that allow third-party extensions and operational visibility.
steps: Create instagram_mcp/plugins.py: Implement PluginManager class. Use importlib.metadata entry_points (group='instagram_mcp.tools') to discover third-party tool registrars. Provide load_plugins() method that finds all entry points, imports them, and returns a list of registrar callables. Each plugin entry point should be a function matching the register_<name>(mcp, client, config, exporter) -> list[ToolDescriptor] signature. Provide list_plugins() -> list[dict] that returns info about loaded plugins. Handle import errors gracefully with logging.

Create instagram_mcp/metrics.py: Implement MetricsCollector class. Track: request_count (per tool name), request_duration_seconds (histogram-like: min/max/avg/p95 per tool), error_count (per tool, per error_type), cache_hit_count, cache_miss_count. Use simple in-memory counters (no external dependencies). Provide record_request(tool_name, duration_s, error=None) method. Provide get_metrics() -> dict method returning all collected metrics. Provide reset() method. Add a context manager/decorator pattern for easy instrumentation: @metrics.track('tool_name').

Integrate plugins into instagram_mcp/__init__.py create_mcp_server(): After register_tools(), call plugin_manager.load_plugins() and invoke each discovered registrar. Log how many plugin tools were loaded.

Integrate metrics into the tool registration: In instagram_mcp/tools/_helpers.py or a new wrapper, add metrics tracking so every tool call records its duration and success/failure to the MetricsCollector singleton.

Add 'instagram_metrics' tool to tools/server.py that exposes current metrics as formatted markdown (request counts, durations, error rates, cache stats). Also add 'instagram_plugins' tool that lists loaded plugins.
Add tests: tests/test_plugins.py (test discovery with mock entry points, test error handling). tests/test_metrics.py (test recording, retrieval, reset, concurrent access).
acceptance_criteria: Plugin loading is called during server creation
MetricsCollector tracks request count and duration
New tools instagram_metrics and instagram_plugins are registered
findings: All 852 tests pass (20 new + 832 existing). Added 2 anonymous tools (instagram_metrics, instagram_plugins) to server toolset. Updated README tool counts to 79 total, 22 anonymous. Plugin system uses importlib.metadata entry_points with group 'instagram_mcp.tools'. MetricsCollector uses singleton pattern with thread-safe locking. The track_tool async context manager can be used to instrument individual tool calls.
